results.name: Palantir Technologies
keyThemes: Government surveillance concerns and civil liberties backlash
results.topBullish:
$ZETA x $PLTR will be an unstoppable force for years to come.

Combined, they have some of the best AI software technology on the planet, and $ZETA's data cloud will be live on $PLTR's foundry in the next month or so.

I'm super bullish on both long term.
results.topBearish: Palantir's $10 billion Army contract, Peter Thiel's $15 million bet on JD Vance, and the government surveillance machine built around your data — EXPOSED. One company now sits inside the IRS, ICE, the Army, and the Treasury. Its co-founder bought a senator who became Vice
results.summary: Organic sentiment toward $PLTR is predominantly negative, driven by sustained public backlash over government surveillance partnerships, civil liberties concerns, and political entanglement with the Trump administration and defense apparatus. The lone substantive bullish thesis centers on the ZETA foundry integration and AI software leadership, while a valuation short argument and bearish technical commentary add further downside pressure to the narrative.

results.name: iShares Bitcoin ETF
keyThemes: ETF inflow dominance vs miners supply
BTC bull run narrative / bear market bottom calls
Options activity with strong gains on IBIT calls
results.topBullish:
Miners mint 450 BTC a day, fixed until 2028.

ETF inflows routinely absorb multiples of that, led by $IBIT.

Grayscale bleeds fees, MicroStrategy is a levered wrapper, and June's record outflows shook out the tourists.

Left standing: $IBIT, 0.25% fee, roughly $58B AUM, spot BTC https://t.co/C7meb4SYsL
results.topBearish:
If bitcoin:native  is about to go on a bull run,  then you want $BTCL  

not $IBIT not bitcoin:native  

with that said bitcoin:native  has no purpose.   

ethereum:native  has a purpose.  And has more upside than Bitcoin

$BMNR
results.summary: Social sentiment around IBIT is broadly bullish, anchored by substantive posts highlighting dominant ETF inflows relative to miner supply, a competitive 0.25% fee structure against rivals, and strong options performance with calls up 75-83%. A small but notable bearish minority questions IBIT's relative value versus leveraged BTC products and ETH-native instruments, while bottom-call narratives and BTC price momentum further reinforce the constructive backdrop.

$AMZN

is poised to become the first company to surpass $1 trillion in annual revenue by 2028.  This is thanks to Amazon's emergence as one of the world's most important infrastructure companies, with businesses spanning e-commerce, cloud computing, logistics, advertising, and https://t.co/yqHWvUaG6p
results.topBearish: @Marioxjumper @wholemars $AMZN was unprofitable for the first 20 years
results.summary: Social media sentiment around $AMZN is predominantly bullish, with multiple posts citing long-term price targets above $350, infrastructure dominance across cloud, e-commerce, and logistics, and active dip-buying behavior. The lone bearish reference to Amazon's historical unprofitability is a historical footnote rather than a current concern, and the volume of organic bullish conviction — including a 200% options ROI claim and a $1 trillion revenue projection — reflects strong retail confidence in Amazon's competitive positioning.

keyThemes: New President hire (Ganesh Aiyer) seen as major catalyst

Stock-based executive compensation signaling insider confidence
results.topBullish:
$KEEL EOD Tape | Price: $4.84 (+5.4%) 📈
Bulls fight back! Reclaimed the morning gap-up on heavy volume (36M+) following the Ganesh Aiyer (Ex-Digital Realty) President news. Massive institutional absorption today off the $4.59 base.
🟢 Bull: Close above $5.00 triggers the short
results.topBearish:
$KEEL on the radar 📡

Down 19.7% this week and the entry sits back at $4.73, trigger up at $6.49.

Stage 2 uptrend, RS leading the market. Not buyable yet. Needs a close above that level on real volume.

+41% to next resistance if it triggers 🚀

NFA
results.summary: Sentiment around $KEEL is broadly bullish, driven primarily by the high-profile appointment of Ganesh Aiyer as President, whose enterprise sales pedigree at Dell, Salesforce, and Digital Realty is viewed as a strong execution signal for the company's AI/HPC infrastructure buildout. Bears are limited to near-term technical caution following a prior weekly drawdown of ~20%, with the prevailing community thesis centered on patience ahead of an anticipated lease or contract announcement.

keyThemes: Technical support at 200 SMA and 61.8% Fibonacci retracement
results.topBullish: The trigger for $APLD is a financing/refinancing package that tells one thing: $APLD can fund the $36B lease book without destroying equity holders. Right now the market still discounts $APLD for debt, dilution risk and execution timing. Remove that fear and the stock will
results.topBearish: $WULF for what it's worth $APLD stock when basically nowhere after three deals in 6 weeks with an investment grade hyperscaler (one of the big four) for $20.2 billion over 15 years. Go figure. The market is just woefully under pricing datacenters right now.
results.summary: Sentiment on $APLD is cautiously bullish, supported by technical buying interest at the 200 SMA/Fibonacci confluence, a notable $408K options sweep targeting ~32% upside by September 2026, and inclusion in multiple AI Infrastructure and NeoCloud watchlists alongside sector peers. The primary bear case centers on persistent market skepticism around debt load and dilution risk despite significant hyperscaler contract wins, suggesting the stock remains undervalued but faces execution and financing overhang that has capped price appreciation relative to peers.
